cards.front: What does the 'su' command call for in Unix?
cards.back: The super user or root user

cards.front: What does the 'su' command switch to as a user?
What is the purpose of the '-s' option in the 'su' command?
cards.back: To specify the command to run as the new root user

cards.front: What is the default behavior of the 'su' command when run without options?
cards.back: It prompts the user for the root password

cards.front: What can be used to become the super user in Unix without typing the root password?
